lumen_philosopher_user_response.description: Short in-character response from the lumen philosopher, addressed to the user.

lumen_philosopher_other_response.description: Short in-character response addressed to the umbra philosopher (optional; use empty string if none). This is for philosophers to talk to each other and can be ignored if you prefer them to only address the user.

lumen_philosopher_notes.description: Words or short phrases the lumen philosopher jots down. Use [] if none.

lumen_philosopher_callouts.description: Optional callouts: [[word_or_phrase, mode], ...] with mode one of keyword, highlight, strike.
